coverage_note: The bundled SLCO1B1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from SLCO1B1 hepatic statin uptake, bile-acid and drug transport, transporter pharmacogenetics, and myopathy-risk biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000134538: SLCO1B1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: SLCO1B1 findings should be read against hepatic statin uptake, bile-acid and drug transport, transporter pharmacogenetics, and myopathy-risk biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs4149056 (SLCO1B1 c.521T>C) is curated as a SLCO1B1 marker for Statin-associated myopathy context, Hepatic transporter pharmacogenomics; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
